suggestedRules: For municipal URLs returning 404, try /kultur, /scen, /evenemang, /foreningar paths
City theater venues often have dedicated event calendars under culture sections

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish municipal theater and performing arts venues

suggestedRules: Sports league/ticket pages with 0 timeTags and low C2 scores should route to D immediately
SHL and similar sports sites use React/Vue frameworks - D queue handles this

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish sports league and team sites with ticket/schedule pages

suggestedRules: Venue pages with multiple C0 candidates but low C1/C2 scores need JS rendering
Arena/multi-event venues often use calendar widgets with client-side rendering

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish arena and venue sites with multi-event calendars
